business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.current_limit: Building: 222340000; Contents: 33432000; Business Income: 59212000; Coinsurance: 90; Deductible: 50000
coverages_discussed.notes: Coverage Part Form Number CP 00 10 10 12; policy number CP-LSPH-2025-7801; producer Texas Commercial Insurance Partners.

Endorsement CP 04 05 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Provides Coverage A for loss to the undamaged portion of the building due to enforcement of ordinance or law requiring demolition after a covered cause of loss.

Endorsement CP 04 09 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss of or damage to Covered Property caused by or resulting from an equipment breakdown accident to covered mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment.

Endorsement CP 04 17 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss of or damage to Covered Property caused by interruption of utility services, including water supply, communication supply, and power supply services.

document_info.document_type: Commercial Property Building and Personal Property Coverage Form / Policy
